criteria.name: Competition Level
criteria.description: Lower is better - how crowded is the space

criteria.name: Content Velocity
criteria.description: How fast can content be produced and consumed

criteria.name: Monetization Potential
criteria.description: Revenue opportunities and audience willingness to pay

criteria.name: AI Automation Fit
criteria.description: How well suited for AI-generated content

criteria.name: Scalability
criteria.description: Ability to grow without proportional effort increase

adhd.Content Velocity_notes: Bite-sized content preferred by ADHD audience
adhd.Jayna's Authority_notes: Strong lived experience with ADHD-like patterns
adhd.AI Automation Fit_notes: Highly structured, actionable content ideal for AI

adhdPerimenopause.Market Size_notes: Smaller but highly targeted - millions of women 35-55
adhdPerimenopause.Jayna's Authority_notes: Perfect intersection of her lived experiences

str.Jayna's Authority_notes: Built cabin business, knows maintenance systems

rankings.keyAdvantage: BLUE OCEAN - No dedicated podcast exists for this intersection
rankings.keyChallenge: Smaller total market, need to educate on connection

rankings.keyAdvantage: Large, growing market with 60+ podcasts but fragmented

rankings.keyChallenge: OVERSATURATED - 45+ podcasts, very hard to break through

rationale: BLUE OCEAN opportunity - no one owns this niche
Jayna's lived experience is the perfect authentic authority
High willingness to pay (women seeking solutions for debilitating symptoms)
Content can be highly actionable and AI-friendly
Natural crossover content from both parent niches
Growing awareness of this connection (Forbes, ADDitude covering it)
secondaryRationale: Can incorporate ADHD content as unique angle
Easier to pivot if intersection niche is too narrow
60+ podcasts shows market validation but also fragmentation opportunity
avoidRationale: Market is oversaturated with 45+ established podcasts
Would require massive marketing spend to break through
Better suited as secondary content pillar or digital product focus
Jayna's STR expertise better monetized through courses/templates

strategicPositioning.winningFormula: The 'ADHD Perimenopause Connection' - daily micro-episodes (5-10 min) with actionable strategies for women navigating both
